versions.version_description: More accurate, more complete than other versions.
This version has accurate chording and has a link to a video for reference.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]  x2

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                    [ch]Bb[/ch]
So you think you're a Romeo,[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
Playing a part in a picture-show.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
Take the long way home, take the long way home.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                            [ch]Bb[/ch]
'Cause you're the joke of the neighborhood,[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                             [ch]C[/ch]
Why should you care if you're feeling good.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
Take the long way home, take the long way home.[/tab]

[Bridge 1]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                           [ch]Em7[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]Am7[/ch]
But there are times that you feel you're part of the scenery,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
All the greenery, is comin' down, boy.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]Em7[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]Am7[/ch]
And then your wife seems to think you're part of the furniture,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
Oh, it's peculiar, she used to be so nice.[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                       [ch]Bb[/ch]
When lonely days turn to lonely nights,[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
You take a trip to the city lights.[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
And take the long way home, take the long way home.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                     [ch]Bb[/ch]
You never see what you want to see,[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
Forever playing to the gallery.[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
You take the long way home, take the long way home.[/tab]

[Bridge 2]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]Em7[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]Am7[/ch]
And when you're up on the stage, it's so unbelievable,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
Unforgettable, how they adore you,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]Em7[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]
But then your wife seems to think you're losing your sanity,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
Oh, calamity, is there no way out?[/tab]

[Solo]
[ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]  x2

[Bridge 3]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]Em7[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Am7[/ch]
Does it feel that your life's become a catastrophe?[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
Oh, it has to be, for you to grow, boy.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]Em7[/ch]                    [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]Am7[/ch]
When you look through the years and see what you could have been,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
Oh, what you  might have been, if you'd had more time.[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                        [ch]Bb[/ch]
So, when the day comes to settle down,[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
Who's to blame if you're not around?[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
You took the long way home, you took the long way home,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
You took the long way home, you took the long way home. (repeat & fade)[/tab]
